name: Chocolate Orange Supreme Cheesecake2
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the crumbs, cinnamon, and melted margarine; press onto the bottom of a 9-inch springform pan. Bake at 325°F for 10 minutes.
2. In a large bowl, combine the cream cheese and sugar. Mix on medium speed until well blended.
3. Add eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition.
4. Blend in the sour cream and vanilla.
5. Blend chocolate into 3 cups of batter; blend liqueur and peel into remaining batter.
6. Pour the chocolate batter over the crust.
7. Bake at 350°F for 30 minutes.
8. Reduce oven temperature to 325°F. Spoon remaining batter over chocolate layer; continue baking for an additional 30 minutes.
9. Loosen the cake from the rim of the pan and cool before removing the rim of the pan. Chill. Garnish with chocolate curls, if desired.
